title: Aegis AI Strategy
summary: AI compliance infrastructure for audit preparation, policy cross-referencing, and governance-ready enterprise controls.
business_hook: Aegis helps regulated teams surface policy conflicts early and compress audit preparation cycles.

title: Public Infrastructure Copilot
summary: GovTech planning engine that converts maintenance records and service requests into ranked infrastructure priorities.
business_hook: A municipal copilot for translating digital backlogs into capital planning decisions.

title: Compliance Twin
summary: A control-system graph for teams managing obligations, evidence, and assurance workflows across regulated environments.
business_hook: Replaces spreadsheet governance with a persistent compliance operating graph.

title: Operator Memory Cloud
summary: Shared execution memory for startup teams that need durable access to decisions, context, and workflow history.
business_hook: Improves execution velocity by reducing context loss across product, GTM, and engineering teams.

title: Civic Procurement Graph
summary: Procurement intelligence layer for agencies and vendors navigating fragmented public bids, contracts, and supplier histories.
business_hook: Turns public procurement data into a searchable intelligence layer for agencies and vendors.

title: Research Commercialization Studio
summary: Commercialization workflow for translating academic and lab research into venture briefs, prototype plans, and market tests.
business_hook: Bridges research outputs and venture formation with commercialization-ready operating assets.

title: Visual Overlay AI for Shopping, Grooming, and Guided Personal Interfaces
summary: Concept-stage visual interface exploration for try-on, grooming guidance, and personal overlay experiences.
business_hook: Tests whether structured capture and CV overlays can create a reusable personal layer for commerce and instruction.

title: Ad Delivery Systems and Platform-Controlled Entertainment Economies
summary: Research exploration of ad targeting, recommendation systems, attention capture, and platform-controlled media delivery.
business_hook: Compares creator-led monetization with platform-led infrastructure models and the responsibility risks that come with them.

title: Career Simulation and Pathway Exploration Platform
summary: Immersive career-path simulation that lets users experience realistic workflows, pressures, skill expectations, and tradeoffs before committing to a path.
business_hook: Career guidance for education, reskilling, workforce readiness, and enterprise talent pipelines where experience matters more than generic advice.

title: Experience-Based Entertainment and Media Worlds
summary: Participatory media environments that turn shows, films, creator ecosystems, and digital formats into structured interactive worlds.
business_hook: Extends passive media into premium engagement, retention, creator-economy, and branded-entertainment surfaces.

title: Text-to-AR Utility Systems
summary: Converts text-based information into contextual spatial interfaces for restaurants, venues, training, games, and guided environments.
business_hook: A pragmatic content and workflow layer for AR-capable environments.

title: Senior-Focused AI Phone Co-Pilot
summary: Accessible AI assistance layer for older adults navigating smartphones and digital tasks through patient, contextual guidance.
business_hook: Targets an underserved, high-friction consumer accessibility problem where generic help docs fail.

title: Conversational Survey and Interview Intelligence Platform
summary: AI-led survey and interview system for adaptive questioning, multilingual understanding, response quality scoring, and structured extraction.
business_hook: Richer research and public/customer feedback than static forms, especially in multilingual or low-completion settings.

title: Freight and Logistics Tracking Intelligence
summary: Operational intelligence layer for shipment visibility, exception detection, reporting automation, analytics, and predictive risk flags.
business_hook: Addresses expensive freight pain around missed deadlines, incomplete reporting, fragmented coordination, and margin risk.

title: AI-Native Enterprise Operating Systems
summary: Business operating layers where specialized AI agents support recurring workflows, documentation, review chains, and decision tracing.
business_hook: Improves execution, oversight, and handoff quality across repeated company workflows.

title: High-Friction Data Access and Proxied Information Systems
summary: Products that convert fragmented, expensive, permission-dependent, or hard-to-observe information into decision-ready proxy signals.
business_hook: Creates value under imperfect observability by making uncertainty explicit and useful.

title: Sports Intelligence and Transfer Market Media Products
summary: Structured sports intelligence products that organize rumor ecosystems, tactical context, player tracking, and confidence scoring.
business_hook: Productizes analysis rather than commentary by making sports information trackable and trustable.

title: Nutrition, Satiation, and Consumption System Redesign
summary: Consumer and public-health exploration around serving-size logic, satiation-adjusted food framing, and realistic nutrition communication.
business_hook: Targets the mismatch between nutrition labels and how people actually eat, decide, and feel full.
